title: Undertow
subtitle: Some secrets don't stay buried. Some people don't stay alive.
description: Six friends. One beach house on the Carolina coast. A weekend that was supposed to feel like old times. By Saturday night, one of them is dead — door locked from the inside, window open to a forty-seven degree night, and an argument the group heard through the ceiling that nobody can explain. Julian Crane wasn't supposed to be involved. He was next door on vacation. But Julian Crane has never been able to walk past something that doesn't add up.
shortDescription: A locked-room murder at a Carolina beach house. A behavioral analyst next door who can't turn his mind off. And a killer who almost got away with it.

mainCharacters.name: Julian Crane
mainCharacters.description: Independent behavioral analyst, usually works fraud and corporate cases. Staying in the rental next door. He walked past their bonfire the night before and noticed something. He can't let it go.

mainCharacters.name: Nadia Reyes
mainCharacters.description: Composed, precise, devastatingly controlled. She has been patient for eight years. This weekend, her patience runs out.

mainCharacters.name: Marcus Calloway
mainCharacters.description: The warmest person in any room. The one who held the group together. He had no idea what he was carrying.

mainCharacters.name: Dean Ashby
mainCharacters.role: Supporting — The One Who Never Knew
mainCharacters.description: Genuinely good, quietly oblivious. He never got the letter. He has no idea what was done in his name.

characterNotes.Mara Voss: Julian's colleague and closest contact. Dry humor, no nonsense, the one person who can get a real response out of him. She pushed him to take this vacation. She has feelings for Julian she keeps professional — they leak in small ways she doesn't always catch in time.

author: StoryWeaver

chapters.title: The Weekend
chapters.mood: Six friends, one beach house, one weekend that was supposed to feel like old times.
